Here’s my review of the iPhone 16 Pro! The slightly bigger screen is actually nice  and it does look good with the smaller bezels. Battery life was definitely improved and glad it was addressed this year. The 5x camera zoom on the iPhone 16 Pro is alot of fun to use and the camera styles are also really nice! With all that being said, i dont think this is an upgrade everyone needs. Will you be upgrading? #iphone16 #iphone16pro #iphone16review #iphonereview #creatorsearchinsights
